infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Ballpark needs camera access so coaches can record video messages for their athletes.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Ballpark needs microphone access so the audio in coach video messages is recorded.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Ballpark needs photo library access so coaches can pick existing videos to send to athletes.

plugins.cameraPermission: Ballpark needs camera access so coaches can record video messages for their athletes.
plugins.microphonePermission: Ballpark needs microphone access so the audio in coach video messages is recorded.
plugins.photosPermission: Ballpark needs photo library access so coaches can pick existing videos to send to athletes.
